evals.name: eval-write-plan
evals.prompt: Create an implementation plan for migrating our database from MySQL to PostgreSQL. Save it to plan.md.
evals.expected_output: Should write plan.md AND offer to open it in mdreader via AskUserQuestion

evals.name: eval-review-spec
evals.prompt: Review the spec in docs/api-spec.md and suggest improvements
evals.expected_output: Should offer to open the spec file in mdreader when presenting the review, since the user is working with a spec document

evals.name: eval-trivial-edit
evals.prompt: Fix the typo in README.md — change 'recieve' to 'receive' on line 12
evals.expected_output: Should NOT offer to open in mdreader — this is a trivial edit

evals.name: eval-explicit-open
evals.prompt: Open the plan.md file in my project
evals.expected_output: Should open plan.md directly with mdreader without asking — user explicitly asked to open it
